title: Elegy Plugin Lock File
description: Lock file that pins the exact Elegy contract bundle version used to build a plugin package. Generated by 'elegy plugin new' and refreshed by 'elegy plugin contracts update'. Plugin repos must keep this file under version control alongside elegy-plugin-package.json.

lockVersion.description: Lock file format version. Incremented when the lock schema itself changes.

sourceAsset.description: URL or local path to the contract bundle asset used to build this plugin.

checksum.description: Cryptographic checksum of the contract bundle (e.g. SHA-256 hex).

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this lock file was generated.

generatedBy.description: Tool and version that generated this lock file (e.g. 'elegy-cli/1.8.0').

pluginPackageRef.description: Relative path to the plugin package JSON this lock file is associated with (defaults to 'elegy-plugin-package.json').
